creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #8)
The autostart I mean "saved KDE Plasma session". I don't have any settings what application should start on startup it is handled automatically by KDE - it starts all application which were running at the session shutdown. In my case it is usually Firefox, Thunderbird, SciTE, Konsole, Audacious, Double Commander. If i close SciTE manually before shutdown it will not be started next time I start KDE. But Audacious in QT flavor is not started. Audacious in GTK flavor is handled well as any other application running on the session shutdown.

I understand that you have a completely different environment, so I don't even want you to waste your time.
